title: taraxacum polyhamatum
intro: Taraxacum polyhamatum, also known as the Mongolian dandelion, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion genus and is commonly found in the mountainous regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum polyhamatum include reducing liver and kidney damage, improving digestion, and enhancing the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
